docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINA, ALSIFREDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMED LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PINA, ALSIFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINA, ALSIFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT FEDEX CORP WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
